identity.name: UP Button Candidate

inputs.name: tone
inputs.description: Deprecated Candidate compatibility alias; use intent.

outputs.name: buttonClick
outputs.description: Deprecated Candidate compatibility alias; use activated.

knownLimitations: Legacy tone and buttonClick aliases remain during the Candidate compatibility window.
Figma property mapping and manual screen-reader review remain pending.

knownResponsibilities: Consumers remain responsible for accessible page composition and meaningful content.

promotionRequirements: Remove or time-box legacy Candidate aliases.

warnings: Legacy Candidate aliases remain visible until current QA examples migrate.
